channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Lucid Motors recalls over 4,000 Gravity SUVs citing improperly welded seat belts
item.description: The company struggled with quality issues when Gravity production started last year, and the new recall shows it's not out of the woods yet.

item.title: Russian iPhone users lose Apple ID payments as Kremlin escalates VPN crackdown
item.description: Russia's Ministry of Digital Development has ordered mobile operators to disable Apple ID payments in a bid to make accessing VPNs harder.

item.title: Parnasse : c’est quoi ce forfait mobile à 1 000 € par mois auquel s’attaque Free Max ?
item.description: Xavier Niel a comparé le nouveau forfait mobile Free Max à un autre proposé à plus de 1 000 euros par mois : Parnasse Monde. Voici ce qui se cache derrière ce nom méconnu.

item.title: The new Storm Radar app is a treasure trove of data for weather nerds
item.description: The horrible winter of 2026 is behind us in New England; now we’ve moved on to the season where there’s a threat of rain basically every day. Given that, the updated Storm Radar app from The Weather Company (owners of the Weather Channel app) caught my eye. There are tons of good weather apps out there, and I’m the kind of nerd that likes to try them all, and Storm Radar feels pretty unique to me. The main interface is, as you’d expect, your local radar. Tapping on any point of the map calls up a detailed forecast for that exact point, with data coming via The Weather Company’s “gridded foreca...

item.title: Nvidia et AMD sur Mac : le retour tant attendu est enfin là
item.description: Vous vous souvenez de l'époque où Apple et nvidia se faisaient la guerre ? Cette ère touche peut-être à sa fin, mais pas grâce à Cupertino. Le framework tinygrad propose désormais un pilote fonctionnel pour brancher vos GPU externes en USB4 sur Mac.

item.title: La plus puissante des clés HDMI d’Amazon revient avec une très belle remise : -40 % pour le Fire TV Stick 4K Max
item.description: Avec le Fire TV Stick 4K Max, vous avez la plus puissante des clés HDMI d'Amazon fonctionnant sous Fire TV. Ce modèle n'est pas le seul en promotion, mais clairement le plus intéressant si vous n'êtes pas satisfait de l'OS de votre TV ou de votre box TV.

item.title: Nintendo is weathering the storm
item.description: Things aren't going so well in the video game industry. Consoles are getting more expensive, games are shutting down, layoffs are prevalent, the live-service space is a mess, major platforms are entering eras of uncertainty, and AI is infiltrating the medium in frustrating ways. Finding a bright spot is rare. But amid all of that, […]

item.title: 'We are growing revenue four times faster than the companies who defined the Internet and mobile eras': OpenAI says it's making $2 billion a month — mostly from enterprise users
item.description: OpenAI is currently making $2 billion in monthly revenue — that's $6 billion quarterly or $24 billion annually.

item.title: Kia shows off the 2027 EV3 at the NY Auto Show
item.description: A couple of years after its overseas debut, Kia’s EV3 will finally come to the US. The automaker said at the New York International Auto Show that the 2027 edition of the subcompact electric SUV will arrive stateside later this year. Kia won't announce pricing until closer to its sale date, but it has previously said it would target a starting price of $35,000.The EV3 could be a welcome addition for Americans shopping for a smaller electric SUV. Compact ones that won't break the bank are a relative scarcity in the US, especially after Volvo killed the EX30. The EV3 is close to a 1:1 match with...

item.title: Guide 2026 : quels iPhone valent le coup (et lesquels sont à éviter) ?
item.description: Faut-il acheter le dernier iPhone ou bien opter pour un modèle plus ancien ? C'est à cette question que nous allons tenter de répondre dans ce guide d'achat. Quel iPhone choisir ? Voici les conseils et recommandations de la rédaction de Frandroid.

item.title: Today is the final day to save up to $150 on a PS5 before the price goes up
item.description: The cost of the PlayStation Portal and every PlayStation 5 console is going up tomorrow, April 2nd, by as much as $150 in some cases. That means time is running out if you want to save yourself the money you’d soon have to spend to secure a PS5, which is why I’m going to point […]

item.title: American Express just announced new lounge plans for 3 major U.S. airports. One concept truly stands out
item.description: The updates include a new Centurion Lounge, a major expansion, and a smaller concept designed for quick stops. American Express is expanding its airport lounge network with a new Centurion Lounge planned for Boston, a second Sidecar concept coming to Charlotte, and a major expansion of its existing space at Dallas-Fort Worth International Airport.

item.title: James Cameron Could Remake ‘Fantastic Voyage’ Before He Works on ‘Avatar 4’
item.description: Plus, get a look at Apple's new horror-comedy 'Widow's Bay'.

item.title: Artemis 2 Live Updates: Countdown to the Moon 🔴
item.description: Follow along with Gizmodo as NASA prepares to launch its first crewed mission to the Moon in over 50 years.

item.title: Save $720 on Aura Identity Theft Protection this Tax Season with 75% off family plans
item.description: Protect your family this Tax Season with 75% off Aura's Family Identity Theft Protection Plan.

item.title: What is the release date for Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 6 on Apple TV?
item.description: Monarch: Legacy of Monsters season 2 episode 6 comes out later this week — this is when you can stream it.

item.title: Roland Go:Mixer Studio review: Portable, professional and plenty of polish
item.description: Way back in 2017, Roland carved out a little niche for itself with the introduction of the Go:Mixer line. The small, portable audio interfaces are a convenient way to connect a mic and multiple musical instruments (or audio sources) to your phone for more professional public performances or on-the-go recording. At this year’s NAMM show, the company unveiled the latest in the family — the Go:Mixer Studio — and it’s the most premium version to date. The Studio adds a display, multitrack output and onboard effects along with a far more luxurious design. At $300, there’s also a far more luxurious...

item.title: Chine | Des robotaxis autonomes se figent au milieu de la route
item.description: Plusieurs robotaxis autonomes appartenant au géant chinois de l’internet Baidu se sont immobilisés avec leurs passagers au milieu de la route dans le secteur de Wuhan mardi à la suite d’un dysfonctionnement, a rapporté la police mercredi.

item.title: A big win for RAM buyers — Save $115 on 32GB of super-fast G.SKILL Flare X5 DDR5-6000 memory using this special code
item.description: Use this code to save $115 on G.SKILL Flare X5 Series DDR5-6000 32GB kit right now — at under $380 that's a huge deal in today's volatile memory market.

item.title: Acer is pretty much giving away this Chromebook when you buy the premium Google software bundle
item.description: Get Gemini Advanced, 2TB of cloud storage, YouTube Premium, and more

item.title: U.S. military attacks on Iran could end in 2–3 weeks, Trump says
item.description: Trump also announced the U.S. would be shifting responsibility for the Strait of Hormuz to countries that rely on it. U.S. President Donald Trump said the military could end its Iran offensive in two to three weeks and will shift responsibility for the Strait of Hormuz to countries that rely on it for oil and shipping as the White House announced a prime-time presidential address Wednesday evening on the war.Trump expressed frustration Tuesday with allies who have been unwilling to do more to support the U.S. war effort, telling them to “go get your own oil.” Trump recently has vacillated betw...

item.title: Mettez Chrome à jour, Google vient de corriger une nouvelle faille zero day
item.description: Google vient de corriger la quatrième faille zero day de l’année ayant été exploitée activement par des hackers dans des attaques.

item.title: Ubisoft face à la justice : l’UFC-Que Choisir veut mettre fin à l’obsolescence des jeux vidéo
item.description: Vous pensiez posséder les jeux de votre bibliothèque numérique ? L'UFC-Que Choisir compte bien prouver le contraire en traînant Ubisoft devant les tribunaux suite à la désactivation brutale du jeu de course The Crew. Une plainte qui pourrait bouleverser tout le modèle économique de l'industrie vidéoludique.

item.title: Fitbit leaps onto the Whoop-style screenless bandwagon, and Steph Curry teases it early
item.description: 'I won't spoil it, you'll kind of have to see it for yourself' Google's screenless Fitbit teased on 'performance advisor' Steph Curry's Insta.

item.title: Nike stock is falling today. What the footwear brand said that has investors worried about the rest of 2026
item.description: The company is in the middle of a turnaround plan, but its latest earnings report brought mixed news about how things are progressing. Nike is attempting to turn things around, but it could be a long road to success.

item.title: Fin du réseau 2G : Orange débranche ses premières antennes dans le Sud-Ouest
item.description: Le vieux réseau de téléphonie mobile 2G va peu à peu disparaître. Si vous ressortez un iPhone de première génération ou un vieux Nokia, il y a de fortes chances qu’il ne capte plus rien dans ces zones.

item.title: AI can push your Stream Deck buttons for you
item.description: If you're tired of controlling Stream Deck devices by manually pushing buttons, then good news: Elgato will now let you delegate that task to a chatbot instead. The Stream Deck 7.4 software update released today introduces Model Context Protocol (MCP) support, allowing AI assistants like Claude, ChatGPT, and Nvidia G-Assist to find and activate Stream […]...

item.title: Piégés dans leur Tesla en feu : le rapport glaçant qui remet en cause le « tout électronique »
item.description: Le rapport d'expertise vient de tomber : lors de l'accident mortel impliquant une Tesla fin 2024 dans les Deux-Sèvres, les quatre occupants n'ont pas succombé au choc de l'impact. S'ils ont perdu la vie, c'est parce qu'ils se sont retrouvés pris au piège dans l'habitacle en feu, incapables d'ouvrir les portières privées d'électricité. Une défaillance qui fait froid dans le dos. ...

item.title: Nothing’s AI devices plan reportedly contains smart glasses and earbuds
item.description: The glasses will reportedly feature cameras, microphones and speakers, and will connect to a smartphone and the cloud to process AI queries.

item.title: Bitcoin could fall victim to quantum computers sooner than expected. Now crypto investors are turning to these alternative coins
item.description: After research from Google suggested a potential threat to some cryptocurrencies, tokens like QRL and Cellframe (CEL) saw their values rise. Bitcoin has been the king of cryptocurrencies since its inception. And despite its high volatility, the token generally benefits from faith among investors that its underlying encryption is sound—which in turn protects digital coins from being stolen from wallets....

item.title: Prix Netflix : quel abonnement choisir en avril 2026 ?
item.description: On peut hésiter sur l'abonnement vers lequel se tourner lorsque l'on s'abonne à Netflix, les prix et avantages évoluant constamment. Pour savoir quel est le meilleur abonnement selon vos besoins, voici notre guide.

item.title: Ce traceur GPS compatible Apple Find My en promo à moins de 15€, au format carte bleue et avec 7 ans d’autonomie, se glisse partout
item.description: Le Ugreen FineTrack Slim Wallet est un traceur GPS à glisser dans votre portefeuille ou n'importe quel autre objet qui aurait tendance à s'égarer souvent, disponible pour 14,95 euros au lieu de 21,99 euros.

item.title: Élue meilleure fibre de France, cette offre internet cache une option redoutable à seulement 1 euro [Sponso]
item.description: L'offre Pure Fibre de Bouygues Telecom s'enrichit pour seulement 1 € de plus : débit quadruplé et Wi-Fi 7 tri-bande sont au menu.

item.title: European Union wants to ban AI-created images and video in official messaging
item.description: The European Union seeks to ban AI-generated images and videos (deepfakes) in official political communications to assert trust.

item.title: Free Max : on a lu les petites lignes, quels sont les limites du forfait illimité ?
item.description: Free lance le forfait Free Max à 29,99 € par mois, offrant un illimité attractif mais avec des conditions spécifiques. L'utilisation prolongée à l'étranger ou des abus de consommation peuvent entraîner des frais supplémentaires après notification. Le forfait est accessible aux transfrontaliers (sous conditions) et couvre presque toute l'Europe, avec des limites plutôt raisonnables....

item.title: Décollage d’Artemis II imminent… mais la météo peut encore tout faire basculer
item.description: Derniers préparatifs avant le grand départ. À quelques heures du lancement d’Artemis II, la Nasa se veut confiante : la fusée est prête, l’équipage aussi. Seule la météo pourrait encore jouer les trouble-fête avant ce moment historique qui doit marquer le retour des astronautes autour de la...

item.title: 'DDR5 retail prices pullback amid market correction': TrendForce report sparks hope that we might be turning a corner in the RAM crisis
item.description: Report even hints at 'DDR5 16GB module prices potentially normalizing by end-2026' — but I really wouldn't get carried away with that idea.

item.title: They’re Already Trying to Baby Yoda Rocky From ‘Project Hail Mary’
item.description: With no fear of spoilers this time around, the rollout for Peak Rocky merch is already well underway.

item.title: 15 Best Office Chairs of 2026— I’ve Tested 65 to Pick Them
item.description: Sitting at a desk for hours? Upgrade your WFH setup and work in style with these comfy WIRED-tested seats.

item.title: Robosen Soundwave review: A childhood dream made real
item.description: There's just something magical about a robot that can convert into a car, tank or plane. It seems that Hollywood agrees as there are several major franchises based around that concept. As someone who grew up in the 80s and 90s, Transformers hold a special place in my heart, despite Michael Bay's best efforts at tarnishing its legacy. I spent countless hours as a kid playing with Hasbro and Takara's plastic figures, but there was one type of toy I always wanted but never got: a robot that could transform on its own just like the ones I watched on TV. That changed a few years ago when Robosen la...

item.title: An immersive 'Black Mirror Experience' is launching in Montreal
item.description: Banijay is launching the Black Mirror Experience, starting with Montreal in May with additional locations to be announced in the future. Specifically, it will be produced by Banijay Live Studio, the new subsidiary of the production company that owns Black Mirror, in partnership with VR firm Univrse. The studio describes it as an interactive virtual reality experience that blends “physical space and VR… designed to blur the lines of fiction and reality in which you become the main character.” While it is based on the hit TV show, you apparently don’t need any prior knowledge of the series to be...
